name: tms-monorepo
description: Transport Management System — enterprise TMS monorepo

scripts.predev: kill-port 3001 3000 && powershell -Command "if (Test-Path 'frontend/.next') { Remove-Item 'frontend/.next' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (Test-Path 'frontend/.next') { Rename-Item 'frontend/.next' 'frontend/.next_old' -Force } }"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.debug: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run start:debug -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w frontend && npm run lint:fix -w backend
